summary: First-iteration full-stack testing of BK Decomart luxury home décor MVP. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests pass (health, generated-images list, static image serving, /api/visualize invalid-product 400, /api/visualize happy-path via public URL treated as soft-pass because Cloudflare ingress returns 502 after ~30s while Nano Banana still processes — direct localhost call to /api/visualize returned 200 with a proper data:image/jpeg;base64,... payload, confirming the backend logic itself works correctly). Frontend: Home hero + sticky nav + glass-nav-on-scroll + floating WhatsApp all work; all 6 nav routes render without errors; ProductCategory (/products/curtains) renders hero + sticky sidebar (WhatsApp/Call/Quote) + features/benefits/materials/colours/care + related; /products/invalid-slug-xyz redirects to /products via <Navigate/>; 404 page renders custom copy; FAQ accordion expands; Footer has all quick links; Contact form correctly opens WhatsApp deep-link https://wa.me/919787713802?text=... with pre-filled name/phone/interest/message; Visualizer disables Generate button and shows 'Rendering…' during API call, re-enables and shows toast error on failure.

minor.issue: Files named *.png are actually JPEG bytes (magic FF D8 FF). Browsers/img tags still render fine because they sniff, but strict clients relying on Content-Type or extension may be misled. Consider renaming to .jpg or re-encoding to real PNG.

Public URL requests timeout at Cloudflare ingress (~30s) with HTML 502 while Nano Banana still runs. Backend itself returns 200 correctly when called on localhost. Not a backend bug — infrastructure ingress timeout. Consider optimising: (a) reduce image size before sending to model, (b) stream progress, or (c) document the constraint in UI.

integration_issues.flow: AI Room Visualizer generate on public URL
integration_issues.issue: Because /api/visualize takes >30s and Cloudflare ingress returns 502, real generation fails end-to-end on the public preview URL. Frontend correctly surfaces toast error and re-enables button. Backend works locally. This is acceptable per test brief (soft-pass) but user-facing UX is 'toast error every time' on the deployed preview.

action_items: OPTIONAL/MINOR: Rename or re-encode pre-generated files so *.png actually contains PNG bytes (currently JPEG payloads with .png extension). Not user-visible.

IMPORTANT: /api/visualize is exceeded by Cloudflare ingress timeout on the public preview URL — end-to-end AI generation currently fails from the deployed site even though the backend works correctly on localhost. Consider (a) shrinking the upload before sending to Gemini, (b) using a background/job pattern with polling, or (c) surfacing a friendlier 'This can take up to a minute — please try again if it times out' message.
No other frontend/backend bugs found. All 14 items in the review request pass or are acceptable soft-passes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:149 — StaticFiles is mounted AFTER include_router. FastAPI handles it fine but conventionally middleware/mounts are configured before app.include_router for clarity.
server.py:151-157 — CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router. This still works but is unusual; safer to add before routes.
server.py:23 — EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is read at import-time. If /api/visualize is called before load_dotenv finishes (impossible here but pattern-wise) it would be None. Acceptable.

Visualizer.jsx:52 — 90s axios timeout is longer than Cloudflare ingress cap (~30-60s) so it will always be the ingress that errors first on the deployed URL, not the client. Consider matching or using a job queue.
Pre-generated static images have .png extension but JPEG magic bytes — minor content-type/extension mismatch.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests pass; 1 soft-pass on public visualize due to ingress timeout)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None. Used the backend's own /api/static/img/generated/hero-living.png as sample upload for Visualizer + backend visualize tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend + Frontend MVP for BK Decomart Madurai luxury décor site is functionally complete. Only real user-facing concern is that /api/visualize on the deployed preview URL times out at Cloudflare ingress (~30-60s) before Nano Banana finishes; localhost call to same endpoint works and returns proper data:image/jpeg;base64 payload. Pre-generated static assets are JPEG with .png extension — cosmetic mismatch only. Reuse /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression.
